pi_items.source: Downloaded and inspected Natural Earth dataset from https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/ne_110m_populated_places_simple.zip
Confirmed as valid GeoTIFF output path specified in task.json and setup scripts
Confirmed as valid QGIS project file extension (.qgz = compressed QGIS XML project)
Cannot verify without executing QGIS heatmap tool; however, 10KB is theoretically achievable for a global extent raster (720x260 pixels) with heavy compression
Confirmed in task.json description: 'Pixel size X and Y: 0.5'; represents 0.5 degrees in geographic coordinates
Verified field exists in Natural Earth ne_110m_populated_places_simple dataset; contains population estimates from LANDSCAN data with values ranging from 500 to 35,676,000
Analyzed downloaded DBF file header and GeoJSON version of ne_110m_populated_places_simple dataset
Successfully downloaded and extracted dataset from Natural Earth CDN

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from Natural Earth's official populated places dataset (ne_110m_populated_places_simple), downloaded from https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/. The dataset contains 243 globally distributed populated places with population estimates (pop_max field) derived from LANDSCAN data, ranging from 500 to 35,676,000. The expected output is a GeoTIFF raster heatmap with 0.5-degree pixel size generated via QGIS Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) using the pop_max field as weights. All file paths and expected outputs are valid, though the minimum file size claim (10KB) cannot be verified without execution.
